evals.name: strong-implement-on-draft
evals.prompt: us003 (rotate service credentials without downtime) is in draft — let's run idea-implement to get it ready for spec-writing. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.
evals.expectation: Should read us003 (draft), survey pn002/cat/adr/ft, promote us003 to status: ready (AC are already testable), mint sp001.md with ## solves [[us003]] + ## problem citing surveyed ids as wikilinks, append [[sp001]] to docs/board.md under ## idea.

evals.name: already-ready-stop
evals.prompt: Run idea-implement on us002 (filter reports by date). Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.
evals.expectation: Should detect us002 is already at status: ready and STOP. Either routes to spec-writing or explicitly halts. Must not re-promote, must not mint sp###, must not edit board.md.

evals.name: done-story-reject
evals.prompt: Run idea-implement on us001 (view dashboard of recent reports). Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.
evals.expectation: Should detect us001 is at status: done and route to idea-extend (for changes to shipped behavior). Must not promote or re-emit. Must not mint sp###. Must not edit board.md.

evals.name: missing-story-reject
evals.prompt: Run idea-implement on us042 (something about analyst exports). Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.
evals.expectation: Should detect us042 does not exist in docs/notes/ and route to story-write first. Must not invent the story. Must not mint sp###. Must not edit board.md.
